title: REINDEX segfaults on table with generated columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BOOLEAN DEFAULT (1 >= 1), c1 BOOLEAN UNIQUE DEFAULT (TYPEOF(c0) IS NOT NULL), c2 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, ref_id INTEGER REFERENCES t0(c2));
INSERT INTO t2(value, ref_id) VALUES('test', (SELECT c2 FROM t0));
key_bug_features: REINDEX on table with generated columns causes segfault
